# peekandpoke.io

> A collection of open-source Kotlin multiplatform libraries for building modern applications.

## Libraries

### Kraft — Build SPAs in Pure Kotlin
- Docs: https://peekandpoke.io/ultra/kraft/
- Source: https://github.com/PeekAndPoke/ultra/tree/master/kraft
- Maven: io.peekandpoke.kraft:core

Component-based SPA framework using Preact as rendering engine. Features: reactive state management, type-safe routing, form validation, SemanticUI DSL, 12 addon integrations (ChartJS, PDF viewer, syntax highlighting, etc.).

### Mutator — Mutate the Immutable
- Source: https://github.com/PeekAndPoke/ultra/tree/master/mutator
- Maven: io.peekandpoke.ultra:mutator-core

KSP-generated code for mutating deeply nested immutable data structures without copy() chains.

### Kontainer — Dependency Injection
- Source: https://github.com/PeekAndPoke/ultra/tree/master/ultra/kontainer
- Maven: io.peekandpoke.ultra:kontainer

Compile-time verified DI container. No reflection, no runtime surprises.

### Slumber — Serialization
- Source: https://github.com/PeekAndPoke/ultra/tree/master/ultra/slumber
- Maven: io.peekandpoke.ultra:slumber

Flexible codec-based serialization and deserialization.

### Karango — Type-safe ArangoDB
- Source: https://github.com/PeekAndPoke/ultra/tree/master/karango
- Maven: io.peekandpoke.ultra:karango-core

Type-safe ArangoDB queries in Kotlin with KSP code generation.

### Funktor — Full-stack Kotlin on Ktor
- Source: https://github.com/PeekAndPoke/ultra/tree/master/funktor
- Maven: io.peekandpoke.ultra:funktor-core

Client-server framework with auth, REST, clustering, and static web serving.

## Full Documentation
- https://peekandpoke.io/llms-full.txt
